message:
feat(ops): add telemetry storage bootstrap module with FrankenSQLite schema

Add ops telemetry database bootstrap module backed by FrankenSQLite for
durable persistence of fleet metrics, search events, and operational
telemetry data.

storage.rs (new):
- OpsStorage struct wrapping FrankenSQLite connection
- OpsStorageConfig with path, retention, and WAL mode settings
- Schema bootstrap with versioned migrations
- bootstrap() and current_version() public API

lib.rs:
- Export storage module and re-export OpsStorage, OpsStorageConfig,
  bootstrap_ops_storage, current_ops_schema_version

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
